projectName.label: Project name
projectName.help: Name of the ioBroker project or installation

projectDescription.label: Project description
projectDescription.help: Short description of what should be documented

additionalNotes.label: Additional notes
additionalNotes.help: Optional notes, devices, adapters or special requirements

autoGenerateOnStart.label: Generate documentation on adapter start
autoGenerateOnStart.help: If enabled, a first documentation draft is created when the adapter starts

onlyEnabledInstances.label: Only document enabled instances
onlyEnabledInstances.help: If enabled, only active adapter instances are included in the documentation

hideInstanceDetailsInMarkdown.label: Hide instance details in markdown
hideInstanceDetailsInMarkdown.help: If enabled, the markdown output contains only summary information without the full instance list

maxDocumentedInstances.label: Maximum documented instances
maxDocumentedInstances.help: Limits how many adapter instances are included in the generated documentation, 0 means unlimited
